source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/04_G1717CW 외 7종/DHF/20. ES 품평회 결과 보고서/ES 품평회 보고서_250314.pptx

sourceSummary.oneLine: DR 개발팀 E/S 품평회 보고서로 G1417/G1717 계열 디텍터의 개발 일정, 제품 구성, 성능 사양, 개발 결과, 신뢰성 및 품질 평가 항목을 정리한다.
sourceSummary.officialUse: E/S 및 PP 개발 단계에서 설계 검증, 품질·안전성 평가, 신뢰성 시험, EMC/CB 인증 및 MFDS 허가 계획 검토에 사용되는 내부 개발 산출물이다.
keyPoints: 개발 일정에는 EMC/CB 인증, MFDS 허가, PP 진행 및 양산이관 단계가 포함된다.
제품 모델은 G1417 Series 및 G1717 Series의 CW, CWP, FW, FWP 모델로 제시된다.
주요 사양으로 CsI scintillator, PIN-TFT sensor, IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac 무선 표준, IP68, 1Giga-bit Ethernet, Line Trigger 및 Auto Trigger가 제시된다.
품질 평가에는 사용환경, 보관환경, IP68 방수방진, 표시장치 시인성, Cycle Time, 낙하 및 면압 요구사항이 포함된다.

evidence.claim: The document is an E/S evaluation report prepared by the DR development team.
evidence.evidenceText: E /S 품평회 보고서 부서 - DR 개발팀

evidence.claim: The development plan includes an MFDS approval stage for domestic MFDS certification as Class 2.
evidence.evidenceText: MFDS 허가 국내 식약처 인증 (2 등급 ) 10~12 월 (3 달 ) DR 개발팀 , 식약처

evidence.claim: The development plan includes EMC/CB certification for domestic, US, and European electromagnetic compatibility and safety.
evidence.evidenceText: EMC/CB 인증 국내 / 미국 / 유럽 전자파 적합성 (EMC & Safety) 7~9 월 (3 달 ) DR 개발팀 , Nemko

evidence.claim: The product output includes a Detector for G1417/G1717.
evidence.evidenceText: 제품 구성 ( 제품 개발 Output) Detector (G1417/G1717)

evidence.claim: The G1417 and G1717 series include models G1417CW, G1417CWP, G1417FW, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717CWP, G1717FW, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: G1417 Series G1717 Series Model Name G1417CW G1417CWP G1417FW G1417FWP G1717CW G1717CWP G1717FW G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The detector specification lists CsI scintillator and PIN-TFT sensor types including a-Si and IGZO, with flexible variants.
evidence.evidenceText: Sensor Type PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) ... Scintillator CsI

evidence.claim: The detector IP range is listed as IP68.
The communication interface is listed as 1Giga-bit Ethernet.
The trigger modes include Line Manual Trigger and Auto Trigger Auto Exposure Detection.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger Mode Line(Manual) Trigger Auto Trigger (Auto Exposure Detection)

evidence.claim: The quality requirement MR1.18 requires IP68 or higher waterproof and dustproof support.
evidence.evidenceText: MR1.18 IP68 이상의 방수방진을 지원해야 한다

evidence.claim: The document summarizes IEC 60529 IPX7 as 1 meter depth for 30 minutes and IPX8 as stricter than IPX7 with manufacturer-defined criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 60529 에 따라 다음과 같이 정리함 . - IPX7 : 1M 수심에서 30 분 보관 - IPX8 : IPX7 보다 엄격한 기준으로 제조자 정함 → 1.2M 수심에서 1 시간 보관

evidence.claim: The external reliability evaluation reports IP68 waterproof and dustproof testing as Pass.
evidence.evidenceText: 방수 방진 IP 등급 IP68 ( 가공 일체형에만 해당 ) Pass

evidence.claim: The external reliability evaluation reports a 1 m steel plate drop test as Fail.
evidence.evidenceText: 낙하 제품 Drop 1m / 철판 / 6 면 , 4 각 ( 가공 일체형에만 해당 ) Fail

evidence.claim: The external reliability evaluation reports pressure testing as Pass under 400 kgf full-front pressure and partial pressure of center 200 kgf and eight points 100 kgf.
evidence.evidenceText: 가압시험 전면 가압 (400 Kgf) / 부분 가압 ( Center 200k gf , 8 Point 100kgf ) Pass

evidence.claim: Firmware and software development results report more than 48 hours of continuous operation without abnormality and 10,000 continuous image acquisitions without abnormality.
evidence.evidenceText: 48 시간 이상 , 연속 구동 이상 無 10,000 회 연속 영상 획득 이상 無

evidence.claim: MR2.3.1 states Cycle Time should be under 4 seconds in wired mode and under 6 seconds in typical wireless mode under Window Time 0.5 second conditions.
evidence.evidenceText: MR2.3.1 Cycle Time... Window Time 0.5 초 조건에서 유선모드에서는 4 초 미만이어야 하며 , 일반적인 환경에서의 무선모드에서는 6 초 미만이어야 한다

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not explicitly stated in the extracted slide text; the filename contains 250314 but no document date field is present.
Revision or version is not present in the source text.
Authority is inferred from source metadata authoritySignal and slide text mentioning MFDS/식약처; no formal approval certificate or authority-issued document number is present.
Some OCR/preprocessing artifacts are present, including repeated GUID-like strings and misspellings such as Storgage and Paramter.
Evidence for drop performance is potentially conflicting or stage-dependent: one slide states 1.2m Drop possible, while the external reliability evaluation lists 1m steel plate drop as Fail.
Waterproof requirement language varies across slides, including IPx6 in an early mechanical task and IP68 in later development, test, and quality sections.
